raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara expanded the mandatory one-year moratorium on homeowners insurance non-renewals and cancellations to include residents impacted by the Hughes Fire.",
    "The insurance moratorium prevents insurance providers from canceling or refusing to renew homeowners policies for one year due to wildfire risk.",
    "The insurance moratorium offers stability and relief for families recovering from wildfire disasters.",
    "Residents in the ZIP codes surrounding the Hughes Fire burn area are now covered under the insurance moratorium.",
    "Homeowners affected by wildfires should not have to worry about losing their insurance coverage during crises."
  ]
}
```
